---
title: "Technical File: Time Series Analysis of State Tract-level Data"
author: 
- "Nathan Alexander, PhD"
- "Ethan Gwinn"
- "Howard University"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    toc_float: true  # Enable floating TOC in the sidebar
    number_sections: true
    theme: cerulean
    always_allow_html: true
    self_contained: true
editor_options:
  markdown:
    wrap: sentence
---

# Project setup

```{r setup, include=F, warning=F, message=F}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(here)
here::i_am("technical-file-time-series-tract.Rmd")

# install packages
#install.packages("tidycensus")
#install.packages("tidyverse")
#install.packages("mapview")
#install.packages("mapgl")
library(tidycensus)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(sf)
library(viridis)
library(scales)
library(readr)
```

# Data import

We'll first search for all variables.

https://api.census.gov/data.html

```{r, eval=F, message=F, warning=F}
vars2020 <- load_variables(2020, "dhc")

View(vars2020)
```


We will start with importing race vars.

```{r, message=F, warning=F}
vars <- c(
  total = "P10_001N",
  white = "P10_003N",
  black = "P10_004N"
)

```

Then we'll pull in data for Mobile, AL.

```{r, message=F, warning=F}
mob_pop_2020 <- get_decennial(
  geography = "county",
  variables = "P1_001N",
  state = "AL",
  sumfile = "dhc",
  year = 2020
) %>% 
  filter(NAME == "Mobile County, Alabama")

mob_pop_2020
```


```{r, message=F, warning=F}
mob_pop_2010 <- get_decennial(
  geography = "county",
  variables = "P001001", 
  state = "AL",
  year = 2010,
  sumfile = "sf1"
) %>% 
  filter(NAME == "Mobile County, Alabama")

mob_pop_2010
```

```{r, message=F, warning=F}
mob_pop_2000 <- get_decennial(
  geography = "county",
  variables = "P001001", 
  state = "AL",
  year = 2000,
  sumfile = "sf1"
) %>% 
  filter(NAME == "Mobile County, Alabama")

mob_pop_2000
```





```{r, message=F, warning=F}
county_joined <- mob_pop_2020 %>% 
  select(GEOID, NAME, value20 = value) %>% 
  left_join(mob_pop_2010, by = "GEOID") %>% 
  mutate(total_change = value20 - value,
         percent_change = 100 * (total_change / value))

county_joined
```




# Building a time series

```{r, message=F, warning=F}

```


```{r, message=F, warning=F}

```


```{r, message=F, warning=F}

```


```{r, message=F, warning=F}

```

```{r, message=F, warning=F}

```



```{r, message=F, warning=F}

```


```{r, message=F, warning=F}

```


```{r, message=F, warning=F}

```


```{r, message=F, warning=F}

```

```{r, message=F, warning=F}

```

```{r, message=F, warning=F}

```


```{r, message=F, warning=F}

```


```{r, message=F, warning=F}

```

```{r, message=F, warning=F}

```

```{r, message=F, warning=F}

```


```{r, message=F, warning=F}

```
